title: Replication Package of the MVVM Multi-vocal Literature Review
author: Fumapps
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This replication package consists of a GitHub repository, which contains the main artifacts of the MLR: * search results: found scholar entries and website entries * filtering: detailed protocol of the filtering/voting process * data extraction: extracted design constructs and trade-offs * data synthesis: categorization of design constructs into design aspects and extracted statistics 
 We used a helper language using JetBrains MPS to model the structure of the classification scheme: 
 https://zenodo.org/doi/10.5281/zenodo.13350489
